sentences.arabic: ضَلَلْتُ الطَّرِيقَ إِلَى الْمَتْحَفِ فَطَلَبْتُ الْمُسَاعَدَةَ مِنْ رَجُلٍ فِي الشَّارِعِ.
sentences.translation: Izgubio sam put do muzeja pa sam zamolio čovjeka na ulici za pomoć.
sentences.translationEn: I lost my way to the museum and asked a man in the street for help.

sentences.arabic: قُلْتُ لَهُ بِالْعَرَبِيَّةِ: «أَيْنَ الْمَتْحَفُ الْوَطَنِيُّ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ؟»
sentences.translation: Rekao sam mu na arapskom: "Gdje je Narodni muzej, molim?"
sentences.translationEn: I said to him in Arabic: "Where is the National Museum, please?"

sentences.arabic: أَجَابَنِي بِابْتِسَامَةٍ وَشَرَحَ لِي الطَّرِيقَ بِالتَّفْصِيلِ.
sentences.translation: Odgovorio mi je s osmijehom i detaljno mi objasnio put.
sentences.translationEn: He answered with a smile and explained the directions in detail.

sentences.arabic: سِرْتُ عَشَرَ دَقَائِقَ ثُمَّ وَجَدْتُ الْمَكَانَ.
sentences.translation: Hodao sam deset minuta i pronašao to mjesto.
sentences.translationEn: I walked ten minutes and found the place.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرْتُهُ كَثِيرًا وَتَعَلَّمْتُ أَنَّ النَّاسَ يُسَاعِدُونَ بِكُلِّ سُرُورٍ.
sentences.translation: Mnogo sam mu zahvalio i naučio da su ljudi uvijek rado od pomoći.
sentences.translationEn: I thanked him warmly and learned that people are always happy to help.
